历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including Physics Category) were approximately 7042 → 5561 → 5391 → 21248 → 6035. An abnormal gap occurred in 2024 (21248th), but quickly rebounded to 6035th in 2025, showing significant volatility in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6035th. Provincial science/physics category enrollment plans: 28 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 37 students, an increase of 131% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Shandong University (Weihai) is the Weihai campus of Shandong University. On the Soft Science main ranking, Shandong University ranks approximately 22nd, placing it among the top-tier domestic universities, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. Shandong University (Weihai) has no independent reputation incidents. The main campus of Shandong University has had a somewhat negative reputation in recent years (e.g., the 'study partner' incident), but the Weihai campus is relatively independent. On Douyin, Shandong University ranks 20th (high popularity), with overall high exposure. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. Relying on Shandong University's discipline evaluations: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Applied Economics A-, Law A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Clinical Medicine A-, etc. The Weihai campus offers majors including Electronic Information, Computer Science, Mathematics, Marine Science, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) continue to gain social popularity, strongly attracting science students. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories combined approximately 285,688), intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6035th, the significant 131% expansion of the 2026 plan (which eases competition, increasing the ranking number), the approximately 32% increase in provincial examinees (partially offsetting the expansion effect), and the high popularity of engineering majors attracting high-scoring students, after minor adjustments, the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 10588th, with a range of 10088–11088th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10088–11088, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<10088), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Electronic Information and Mathematics. If the ranking is near the upper limit (>11088), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
